title: Cusparia macrophylla
taxonomy: Cusparia macrophylla is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant is a member of the Cusparia genus, which consists of several species of climbing or scrambling shrubs. The Cusparia macrophylla is known for its large leaves and showy flowers. Its classification also includes the family Apocynaceae, which is a large and diverse group of flowering plants.
